items.title: White House deletes thousands of web pages about energy conservation as heatwave slams US
items.description: The US Department of Energy reportedly deleted about 6,000 pages related to energy conservation as a historic heatwave tears across the country. The deletion was suspiciously timed, following Republican outrage over Mayor Zohran Mamdani asking New Yorkers to help reduce strain on the grid by setting...

items.title: Qi fan fan
items.description: The Kuxiu D5 keeps Qi-compatible phones cool while also charging a watch and earbuds. items.title: The square-ish phone that I wanted to love
items.description: A great concept that falls flat. The Ikko MindOne Pro is delightfully small. The camera flips up so you can use it for selfies - you can even open it partway to use as a sta...

items.title: Matic’s robot vacuum is getting a $250 price hike in September
items.description: The Matic is our favorite robot vacuum by a pretty comfortable margin. If you’ve been thinking about buying one, you may want to plan on doing it sooner than later.
